productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Gold Stilettos
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. The zippered midfoot closure makes this a fab addition to your party wardrobe. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic straps across the forefoot and around the ankle, with a midfoot zipper closure Raw silk footbed with a synthetic patch Outsole TPR outsole with grooves on the forefoot for grip Pencil heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
